definition:
1. to sprinkle , φάρμακα πάσσων laying  salves upon  a wound, (Iliad by Homer): —;with genitive partitive, πάσσε ἁλός sprinkle some  salt, (Iliad by Homer) 
2. to besprinkle , χρυσῶι, ῥόδοις π. τινά (Aristophanes Comicus) 
3. metaphorically to embroider, broider , (Iliad by Homer); π. ἀέθλους to work  battles in embroidery , (Iliad by Homer) (ML)
